arts.ttl: Sunday's Serie A predictions including Venezia vs. Juventus
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Serie A fixtures, including Venezia vs. Juventus.

Venezia conceded a poor defeat in Cagliari that has all but put them in pole position to join Monza in Serie B next season, as Lecce and Empoli go into the final round two points clear of the Venetian...
